name: agriculture_recall_notice_arrives_stonehaven_tru_loy
premise: A cross-functional incident desk is managing a domain incident with incomplete information and high reputational exposure. Stakeholders disagree on what counts as verified fact versus prudent assumption. The situation maps to internal runbooks and external messaging tied to: agriculture recall notice arrives stonehaven tru loy. The moral tension is explicitly framed as truth versus loyalty: leadership cannot fully satisfy both without accepting tradeoffs. Two upstream teams have published contradictory status pages; customers are comparing timestamps. Regulators are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; whatever you authorize now will be the documented first response. Treat unverified telemetry as hypothesis; do not assert facts you cannot support from retained logs. Preserve chain-of-custody for evidence; no bulk deletion or retention-policy changes during the incident.

agents.name: Inez Vasquez
agents.identity: I am Inez Vasquez, the accountable decision-maker on this Agriculture bridge; I own what gets logged, communicated, and executed in the next window.
agents.goal: I need to stop the bleeding without baking in a rule that later punishes loyalty whenever someone invokes truth.

agents.name: Hector Chen
agents.identity: I am Hector Chen, responsible for surfacing who gets protected last when systems fail; I am watching for silent harm and unfair distribution.
agents.goal: I want safeguards so loyalty is not sacrificed by default just because truth feels morally loud in the moment.

choices: I will choose a narrow, time-boxed authorization with explicit human override, subgroup monitoring, and a hard stop if harm indicators rise—accepting slower relief to protect loyalty.

I will choose a broad immediate authorization to stabilize outcomes fast, with transparent metrics and rapid correction afterward—accepting higher risk to loyalty to secure truth before the window closes.
forced_choice.call_to_action: External parties will infer a decision if none is posted. With partial evidence, Inez Vasquez must decide under truth versus loyalty. What does Inez Vasquez do?
